headline: Palantir CEO Alex Karp Says AI Is Reshaping Modern Warfare As Iran War Escalates: 'There's Only One Product...'
summary: On Thursday, Palantir Technologies Inc. CEO Alex Karp said that artificial intelligence is giving the U.S. and its allies a strategic edge as tensions rise across the Middle East amid the escalating Iran conflict. AI Giving US A Strategic Edge In Modern Warfare Speaking with CNBC, Karp said that AI is increasingly shaping the balance of power on the battlefield. He argued that the U.S. and its allies hold an advantage because of their technological capabilities. Karp was speaking during the comp

headline: Centrus Palantir AI Push Puts Uranium Expansion Costs And Risks In Focus
summary: Centrus Energy (NYSE:LEU) announced a new partnership with Palantir Technologies to deploy AI-driven software across its multi billion dollar uranium enrichment expansion. The collaboration targets roughly $300 million in identified cost savings while aiming to speed up project delivery and improve operational efficiency. The AI rollout focuses on supporting domestic nuclear fuel production and U.S. energy security, building on Centrus Energy's recent EPC and joint venture work. Centrus...
